title: graph-clustering Configuration
description: Graph community detection and clustering processor

batch_size.description: Event count threshold for triggering detection

detection_interval.description: Interval between community detection runs (e.g. 30s or 5m)

enable_anomaly_detection.description: Enable anomaly detection after structural computation

enable_structural.description: Enable structural index computation (k-core and pivot distance)

enhancement_workers.description: Number of parallel workers for LLM enhancement (default 5)

llm_endpoint.description: URL for LLM endpoint (required if enable_llm is true)

llm_model.description: Model name for LLM service (e.g. mistral-7b-instruct)

min_community_size.description: Minimum number of entities to form a community

pivot_count.description: Number of pivot nodes for distance indexing (default 16)
